mano_cua.result_summary: API Key输入框未校验空格。在Integrations页面选择Grafana，输入URL'https://grafana.example.com'和含空格的API Key'abc 123 def'，点击Save Integration后表单成功提交，显示'Integration created: Grafana integration has been successfully created.'。无任何校验错误提示。Grafana卡片从'Add Integration'变为'Configure'确认集成创建成功。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Navigated to Integrations > Grafana > entered Grafana URL and API Key 'abc 123 def' (with spaces) > clicked Save Integration. Form submitted successfully with success toast. No validation error for spaces in API Key.

step 26: success message 'Integration created: Grafana integration has been successfully created.' appeared
step 27: Grafana card changed to 'Configure' confirming integration was saved
